Chat Edit: 'VSIXLoader::GetInstance() - already defined in header but vsix_loader.cpp isn't being compiled from the right location
CPUInferenceEngine methods - need to add cpu_inference_engine.cpp to build
ReactServerGenerator - disabled, need stubs
CoreGenerator - need stubs
AdvancedFeatures - need stubs
InteractiveShell helper methods - need implementations

Lets fully fix these internally and externally to function properly and as insisted'
